testcase.name: AgentRole and slot mapping > getSlotForRole > returns coding for coder and reviewer
AgentRole and slot mapping > getSlotForRole > returns planning for all other roles
AgentRole and slot mapping > AGENT_ROLE_LABELS > has human-readable label for each role
AgentRole and slot mapping > AGENT_ROLE_CANONICAL_ORDER > matches README/PRD agent table order
AgentRole and slot mapping > AGENT_ROLE_PHASES > has phase(s) for each role matching README table
AgentRole and slot mapping > AGENT_ROLE_DESCRIPTIONS > has entry for all 9 roles in AGENT_ROLE_CANONICAL_ORDER
AgentRole and slot mapping > AGENT_ROLE_DESCRIPTIONS > matches README table descriptions exactly for all 9 agents
AgentRole and slot mapping > sortAgentsByCanonicalOrder > sorts agents by canonical role order
AgentRole and slot mapping > sortAgentsByCanonicalOrder > sorts entries with getAgent when provided
AgentRole and slot mapping > sortAgentsByCanonicalOrder > uses phase-derived role when role is missing (coding→coder, review→reviewer)
AgentRole and slot mapping > AGENT_ROLE_PHASES (consistency check) > has phase(s) for each role matching agent.ts source of truth
AgentRole and slot mapping > AGENT_ROLE_PHASES (consistency check) > covers all roles in AGENT_ROLE_CANONICAL_ORDER
AgentRole and slot mapping > AGENT_ROLE_PHASES (consistency check) > matches README table phases for all 9 agents
AgentRole and slot mapping > getRoleDisplayLabel > returns role label only when name is absent
AgentRole and slot mapping > getRoleDisplayLabel > returns role (name) when name is present
AgentRole and slot mapping > getRoleDisplayLabel > falls back to phase label when role is unknown
AgentRole and slot mapping > getRoleDisplayLabel > ignores empty or whitespace-only name
build config (production dist output) > tsconfig.build.json has outDir ./dist
build config (production dist output) > tsconfig.build.json has rootDir ./src
build config (production dist output) > package.json build script uses tsconfig.build.json
build config (production dist output) > package.json exports dist for production (import/require)
build config (production dist output) > build produces dist/index.js and dist/index.d.ts when run
COMMIT_MESSAGE_TITLE_MAX_LENGTH > is 45 for commit message / task title display truncation
getTestCommandForFramework > returns '' for null
getTestCommandForFramework > returns '' for 'none'
getTestCommandForFramework > returns 'npm test' for 'jest'
getTestCommandForFramework > returns 'node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs…' for 'vitest'
resolveTestCommand > resolves 'pytest'
resolveTestCommand > resolves 'node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs…'
resolveTestCommand > resolves 'npm test'
resolveTestCommand > resolves 'npm test'
agent naming > maps slot +0 to 'Frodo'
agent naming > maps slot 1 to 'Samwise'
agent naming > maps slot 13 to 'Frodo'
agent naming > maps 'coder' slot +0 to 'Frodo'
agent naming > maps 'reviewer' slot +0 to 'Boromir'
agent naming > maps 'dreamer' slot +0 to 'Gandalf'
agent naming > wraps role-specific names by modulo
agent naming > falls back to the coder pool for unknown roles
isAgentAssignee > returns true for 'Frodo'
isAgentAssignee > returns true for 'Boromir'
isAgentAssignee > returns false for 'agent-1'
isAgentAssignee > returns false for null
isAgentAssignee > returns false for undefined
isAgentAssignee > returns false for ''
isBlockedByTechnicalError > returns true for 'Merge Failure'
isBlockedByTechnicalError > returns true for 'Coding Failure'
isBlockedByTechnicalError > returns false for 'Open Question'
isBlockedByTechnicalError > returns false for 'API Blocked'
isBlockedByTechnicalError > returns false for 'Waiting for Human'
isBlockedByTechnicalError > returns false for null
isBlockedByTechnicalError > returns false for undefined
isBlockedByTechnicalError > returns false for ''
technical block constants > keep the known technical reasons
technical block constants > uses an eight-hour blocked retry interval
desktop artifact names (fixed for permalinks) > electron build.mac.artifactName is set and does not contain version
desktop artifact names (fixed for permalinks) > electron build.win.artifactName is set and does not contain version
desktop artifact names (fixed for permalinks) > electron build.linux.artifactName is set and does not contain version
dev config (source-direct imports) > root dev script builds shared and starts concurrently
dev config (source-direct imports) > frontend vite.config aliases @opensprint/shared to source
dev config (source-direct imports) > backend vitest.config aliases @opensprint/shared to source
dev config (source-direct imports) > frontend vitest.config aliases @opensprint/shared to source
dev config (source-direct imports) > shared package exports have src fallback when dist absent
dev config (source-direct imports) > dev script runs shared in watch mode alongside backend and frontend
dev config (source-direct imports) > dev script starts both backend and frontend via concurrently
dev config (source-direct imports) > setup script builds shared before applying database schema
dev config (source-direct imports) > setup script falls back from opensprint login to postgres login for local bootstrap
dev config (source-direct imports) > setup script runs local credential bootstrap even when WSL skips service management
dev config (source-direct imports) > setup script supports sudo-based peer auth bootstrap for WSL postgres installs
parsePlanTasks > returns empty array when content is empty
parsePlanTasks > returns empty array when no Tasks or Instructions section
parsePlanTasks > parses ## Tasks section with ### Title blocks
parsePlanTasks > parses numbered ### headings (e.g. ### 1. Title)
parsePlanTasks > uses ## Instructions when ## Tasks is absent
parsePlanTasks > prefers ## Tasks over ## Instructions
parsePlanTasks > handles case-insensitive section names
parsePlanTasks > handles task with empty description
plan-template > PLAN_MARKDOWN_SECTIONS > includes all PRD §7.2.3 required sections
plan-template > getPlanTemplate > returns template with feature title as H1
plan-template > getPlanTemplate > includes all required sections
plan-template > getPlanTemplate > handles empty title by using 'Feature'
plan-template > getPlanTemplate > trims whitespace from title
plan-template > validatePlanContent > returns no missing sections when all are present
plan-template > validatePlanContent > identifies missing sections
plan-template > validatePlanContent > handles empty content
plan-template > validatePlanContent > handles content with only whitespace
plan-template > validatePlanContent > matches section with parenthetical (e.g. Acceptance Criteria (with testable conditions))
plan-template > validatePlanContent > is case-insensitive for section matching
Plan version types > PlanVersionSummary has id, version_number, created_at, optional is_executed_version
Plan version types > PlanVersionContent has version_number, title, content, optional metadata, created_at, optional is_executed_version
Plan version types > Plan accepts optional currentVersionNumber and lastExecutedVersionNumber
PlanMetadata > accepts optional reviewedAt as null or ISO timestamp
PLAN_STATUS_ORDER > orders planning < building < in_review < complete
sortPlansByStatus > 'orders planning before building befor…'
sortPlansByStatus > 'preserves relative order inside the s…'
sortPlansByStatus > returns a new array without mutating the input order
sortPlansByStatus > handles an empty array
sortPlansByStatus > sends unknown statuses to the end via the fallback order
DEFAULT_HIL_CONFIG > defaults all three categories to automated for new projects
getAgentForComplexity > should return simpleComplexityAgent for low
getAgentForComplexity > should return simpleComplexityAgent for medium
getAgentForComplexity > should return complexComplexityAgent for high
getAgentForComplexity > should return complexComplexityAgent for very_high
getAgentForComplexity > should return simpleComplexityAgent when complexity is undefined
getAgentForPlanningRole > Dreamer always returns complexComplexityAgent
getAgentForPlanningRole > Analyst always returns simpleComplexityAgent
getAgentForPlanningRole > Planner/Harmonizer/Auditor/Summarizer inherit plan complexity
parseSettings > should pass through two-tier format unchanged
parseSettings > should default both tiers when missing
parseSettings > should default gitWorkingMode to worktree when parseSettings receives empty object
parseSettings > should use provided simple/complex when present
parseSettings > should default gitWorkingMode to worktree when missing
parseSettings > should default gitWorkingMode to worktree when invalid
parseSettings > should preserve gitWorkingMode branches when valid
parseSettings > should preserve gitWorkingMode worktree when valid
parseSettings > should parse and preserve valid reviewAngles
parseSettings > should filter invalid reviewAngles and return undefined when empty
parseSettings > should return undefined for reviewAngles when array is empty
parseSettings > should parse enableHumanTeammates (default false)
parseSettings > should round-trip teamMembers through parseSettings
parseSettings > should filter invalid teamMembers entries and trim id/name
parseSettings > should return empty array for teamMembers when array is empty (explicit clear)
parseSettings > should preserve a valid aiAutonomyLevel
parseSettings > mergeStrategy > should default to per_task when parseSettings receives empty object
parseSettings > mergeStrategy > should yield per_epic when mergeStrategy is per_epic
parseSettings > mergeStrategy > should yield per_task when mergeStrategy is per_task
parseSettings > mergeStrategy > should normalize invalid mergeStrategy to per_task
parseSettings > mergeStrategy > should normalize non-string mergeStrategy to per_task
parseSettings > mergeStrategy > should default to per_task when mergeStrategy is missing
parseSettings > mergeStrategy > should preserve mergeStrategy on round-trip
parseSettings > worktreeBaseBranch > should default to main when parseSettings receives empty object
parseSettings > worktreeBaseBranch > should default to main when worktreeBaseBranch is empty string
parseSettings > worktreeBaseBranch > should default to main when worktreeBaseBranch is whitespace only
parseSettings > worktreeBaseBranch > should default to main when worktreeBaseBranch contains invalid chars (spaces)
parseSettings > worktreeBaseBranch > should default to main when worktreeBaseBranch contains invalid chars
parseSettings > worktreeBaseBranch > should preserve valid worktreeBaseBranch main
parseSettings > worktreeBaseBranch > should preserve valid worktreeBaseBranch with slash
parseSettings > worktreeBaseBranch > should preserve valid worktreeBaseBranch with underscore, hyphen, dot
parseSettings > worktreeBaseBranch > should trim valid worktreeBaseBranch
parseSettings > worktreeBaseBranch > should default to main when worktreeBaseBranch is not a string
parseSettings > selfImprovementFrequency > VALID_SELF_IMPROVEMENT_FREQUENCIES contains never, after_each_plan, daily, weekly
parseSettings > selfImprovementFrequency > SELF_IMPROVEMENT_FREQUENCY_OPTIONS has one option per frequency with labels
parseSettings > selfImprovementFrequency > should default to never when parseSettings receives empty object
parseSettings > selfImprovementFrequency > should default to never when selfImprovementFrequency is missing
parseSettings > selfImprovementFrequency > should preserve valid selfImprovementFrequency values
parseSettings > selfImprovementFrequency > should normalize invalid selfImprovementFrequency to never
parseSettings > selfImprovementFrequency > should pass through selfImprovementLastRunAt and selfImprovementLastCommitSha when present
parseSettings > selfImprovementFrequency > should leave selfImprovementLastRunAt and selfImprovementLastCommitSha undefined when missing or invalid
parseSettings > autoExecutePlans > should default to false when parseSettings receives empty object
parseSettings > autoExecutePlans > should default to false when autoExecutePlans is missing
parseSettings > autoExecutePlans > should preserve true when autoExecutePlans is true
parseSettings > autoExecutePlans > should normalize non-boolean to false
getDefaultDeploymentTarget > returns first isDefault target when targets exist
getDefaultDeploymentTarget > returns first target when no isDefault and targets exist
getDefaultDeploymentTarget > returns config.target when no targets array
getDefaultDeploymentTarget > returns production when no targets and no target
getDeploymentTargetConfig > returns target config by name
getDeploymentTargetConfig > returns undefined when target not found
getDeploymentTargetConfig > returns undefined when no targets
getTargetsForDeployEvent > returns targets with matching autoDeployTrigger
getTargetsForDeployEvent > treats missing autoDeployTrigger as none
getTargetsForDeployEvent > returns empty array when no targets
getTargetsForDeployEvent > returns empty array when targets is empty
getTargetsForNightlyDeploy > returns targets with autoDeployTrigger nightly
getTargetsForNightlyDeploy > returns empty array when no nightly targets
getTargetsForNightlyDeploy > returns empty array when targets is empty
parseSettings deployment migration > migrates autoDeployOnEpicCompletion to default target autoDeployTrigger
parseSettings deployment migration > migrates autoDeployOnEvalResolution to default target autoDeployTrigger
parseSettings deployment migration > migrates both flags: autoDeployOnEpicCompletion takes precedence
parseSettings deployment migration > migrates to existing default target in targets array
parseSettings deployment migration > does not add migration when legacy flags are false or absent
parseSettings deployment migration > migrates top-level envVars into default target when targets exist
parseSettings deployment migration > migrates top-level envVars into staging and production targets when no targets (Expo)
parseSettings deployment migration > accepts and persists easProjectId when mode is expo
parseSettings deployment migration > migrates legacy expoConfig.projectId to easProjectId when mode is expo
parseSettings deployment migration > prefers easProjectId over expoConfig.projectId when both present
getDeploymentTargetsForUi > returns synthetic staging and production for expo mode with no targets
getDeploymentTargetsForUi > returns targets array for custom mode
getDeploymentTargetsForUi > returns empty array for custom mode with no targets
getProviderForAgentType > returns ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for claude
getProviderForAgentType > returns CURSOR_API_KEY for cursor
getProviderForAgentType > returns OPENAI_API_KEY for openai
getProviderForAgentType > returns GOOGLE_API_KEY for google
getProviderForAgentType > returns null for claude-cli and custom
getProviderForAgentType > returns null for lmstudio (excluded from API key provider resolution)
API_KEY_PROVIDERS > includes ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, CURSOR_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, and GOOGLE_API_KEY
validateApiKeyEntry > accepts valid entry with id and value
validateApiKeyEntry > accepts entry with limitHitAt
validateApiKeyEntry > accepts entry with invalidAt
validateApiKeyEntry > trims id
validateApiKeyEntry > throws when entry is not an object
validateApiKeyEntry > throws when id is missing or empty
validateApiKeyEntry > throws when value is not a string
validateApiKeyEntry > throws when limitHitAt is present but not a string
validateApiKeyEntry > throws when invalidAt is present but not a string
validateApiKeyEntry > accepts optional label and includes it in output
mergeApiKeysWithCurrent > returns current when incoming is null or invalid
mergeApiKeysWithCurrent > preserves value when id exists and value omitted (masked)
mergeApiKeysWithCurrent > replaces value when new value provided
mergeApiKeysWithCurrent > removes providers not in incoming (replace semantics)
mergeApiKeysWithCurrent > adds new entry with new id
mergeApiKeysWithCurrent > merges OPENAI_API_KEY entries
mergeApiKeysWithCurrent > preserves label when value omitted (masked)
mergeApiKeysWithCurrent > uses incoming label when provided
mergeApiKeysWithCurrent > preserves order of incoming array (drag-to-reorder)
sanitizeApiKeys > returns undefined for null
sanitizeApiKeys > returns undefined for non-object
sanitizeApiKeys > returns undefined for empty object
sanitizeApiKeys > sanitizes valid apiKeys for known providers
sanitizeApiKeys > preserves label when present
sanitizeApiKeys > ignores unknown provider keys
sanitizeApiKeys > skips invalid entries within array
isLimitHitExpired > returns true when limitHitAt is undefined
isLimitHitExpired > returns true when limitHitAt is older than 24h
isLimitHitExpired > returns false when limitHitAt is within 24h
isLimitHitExpired > returns true for invalid ISO string
isLimitHitExpired > returns true when date coercion throws
parseSettings — apiKeys ignored (stored in global settings only) > does not include apiKeys in output (project-level keys removed)
parseSettings — apiKeys ignored (stored in global settings only) > does not include apiKeys when absent
maskApiKeysForResponse > returns undefined for undefined apiKeys
maskApiKeysForResponse > returns undefined for empty apiKeys
maskApiKeysForResponse > masks values and preserves id and marker timestamps
maskApiKeysForResponse > never includes value in output
maskApiKeysForResponse > preserves label in masked output
DEFAULT_DATABASE_URL > is the local Docker Postgres URL (deprecated, use getDefaultDatabaseUrl for default)
getDefaultDatabaseUrl > returns path under homedir ending in opensprint.sqlite
validateDatabaseUrl > accepts valid postgresql URL
validateDatabaseUrl > accepts valid postgres URL
validateDatabaseUrl > accepts remote Supabase-style URL
validateDatabaseUrl > trims whitespace
validateDatabaseUrl > throws when empty or not a string
validateDatabaseUrl > throws when scheme is not postgres/postgresql or SQLite path
validateDatabaseUrl > accepts SQLite URLs and paths
validateDatabaseUrl > normalizes legacy sqlite:/file: shorthand prefixes
validateDatabaseUrl > throws for sqlite:// or file:// without path
validateDatabaseUrl > throws when URL is malformed (missing host)
validateDatabaseUrl > throws the generic parser error for malformed PostgreSQL URLs
getDatabaseDialect > returns postgres for postgres/postgresql URLs
getDatabaseDialect > returns sqlite for sqlite/file URLs and paths
maskDatabaseUrl > redacts password, keeps host and port visible
maskDatabaseUrl > handles URL without password
maskDatabaseUrl > returns empty string for empty input
maskDatabaseUrl > returns *** for invalid URL
maskDatabaseUrl > returns canonical SQLite URLs and paths unchanged
maskDatabaseUrl > normalizes legacy SQLite shorthand to canonical path/URL
isLocalDatabaseUrl > returns true for localhost
isLocalDatabaseUrl > returns true for 127.0.0.1
isLocalDatabaseUrl > returns false for remote hosts
isLocalDatabaseUrl > returns false for invalid URL
getProvidersInUse > returns ANTHROPIC_API_KEY when claude in use
getProvidersInUse > returns CURSOR_API_KEY only when both agents are cursor
getProvidersInUse > returns ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for claude-cli
getProvidersInUse > returns OPENAI_API_KEY when openai in use
getProvidersInUse > returns OPENAI_API_KEY with other providers when mixed
getProvidersInUse > does not add a provider for lmstudio (excluded from API key resolution)
getProvidersRequiringApiKeys > returns ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for claude only (not claude-cli)
getProvidersRequiringApiKeys > returns CURSOR_API_KEY when cursor in use
getProvidersRequiringApiKeys > returns both when claude and cursor in use
getProvidersRequiringApiKeys > returns empty for claude-cli and custom only
getProvidersRequiringApiKeys > returns OPENAI_API_KEY when openai in use
getProvidersRequiringApiKeys > returns OPENAI_API_KEY with other providers when mixed
getProvidersRequiringApiKeys > does not add a provider for lmstudio (excluded from API key resolution)
spec-serializer > round-trips Prd to markdown and back
spec-serializer > handles dynamic sections (e.g. competitive_landscape)
spec-serializer > handles empty sections
complexityToDisplay > returns Simple for 1-5
complexityToDisplay > returns Complex for 6-10
complexityToDisplay > returns null for undefined or invalid
clampTaskComplexity > returns value for valid integer 1-10
clampTaskComplexity > returns undefined for invalid types
clampTaskComplexity > returns undefined for out-of-range integers
clampTaskComplexity > exports valid range constants
getEpicId > returns 'opensprint.dev-xyz.2' for 'opensprint.dev-xyz.2.1'
getEpicId > returns 'opensprint.dev-8rx.10' for 'opensprint.dev-8rx.10.0'
getEpicId > returns 'bd-a3f8' for 'bd-a3f8.1'
getEpicId > returns 'opensprint.dev-xyz' for 'opensprint.dev-xyz.2'
getEpicId > returns 'opensprint.dev-8rx' for 'opensprint.dev-8rx.10'
getEpicId > returns 'opensprint.dev-xyz' for 'opensprint.dev-xyz'
getEpicId > returns 'bd-a3f8' for 'bd-a3f8'
getEpicId > returns 'epic1' for 'epic1'
getEpicId > returns 'a.b.c' for 'a.b.c.123'
